additional_diagnoses.evidence_span: the creatinine rose from a normal baseline to 180 µmol/L, consistent with acute kidney injury secondary to dehydration — this developed after admission
additional_diagnoses.rationale: Arose during the episode (condition onset flag 2); required monitoring and treatment (rehydration). Added under the 'code also' instruction on DX-ENDO-002.

additional_diagnoses.evidence_span: Potassium fell to 2.9 mmol/L during insulin therapy and was replaced intravenously
additional_diagnoses.rationale: Hospital-acquired during insulin therapy (flag 2); required IV replacement and monitoring.

predicted_ar_drg.description: (synthetic) MDC 10 diabetes with complication, complexity B

hard_cases_exercised: Condition onset flag 2 (hospital-acquired AKI and hypokalaemia) vs flag 1 (DKA present on admission)
